'''Essic Daroom''' (nicknamed '''"Cartographer"''' by his fellow workers) was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] in the [[Hyperspace Navigator's Guild]] during the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]. He was responsible for cataloging all [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace routes]] brought in and comparing them to old routes to ensure the existing maps did not become obsolete.<ref name="BatDC" />

{{Char-stub}}
